prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-MMESQAS12O-12OZ-CLR-2PK Product Type: CLEANING_AGENT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Anti-Fog Spray for Goggles, Masks and Eyeglasses, 0.5 fl oz, 2-pk, Bulk Description: Clear vision is important for any type of activity. Use GEAR AID Anti-Fog Spray to keeps a variety of eyewear and protective lenses clean and fog-free.

This 2-in-1 formula is designed to prevent fogging on all types of wet and dry lenses, while also acting as an alcohol-free cleaner. It works on swim and ski goggles, dive and snorkel masks, non-AR (anti-reflective) eyeglasses, sunglasses (without CAB/CAP coatings), face shields, safety glasses, and more. Previously known as Sea Quick, it’s highly concentrated with a single 0.5 fl oz bottle lasting multiple treatments (150 pumps).

Spray it on glass, plastic, and even prescription lenses. Just spray once, let dry for a few minutes, then buff for long lasting anti-fog protection. Repeat treatment as needed to improve performance with each application as the anti-fog coating “builds up” over time. Make the most out of each day with clean, properly defogged eyewear using Anti-Fog Spray. Search Terms: scuba anti fog defogger mask goggles Features: - Apply this cleaner and anti-fog on wet and dry lenses including swim goggles, snorkel and dive masks, non-AR eyeglasses, sunglasses, face shields, and safety glasses - Treat multiple goggles, masks, and eyeglasses with this concentrated, alcohol-free anti-fog; one 0.5 fl oz bottle pumps out 150 sprays - Use easily for clear and clean vision that’s effective for hours on glass, plastic, vinyl, and acrylic lenses (e.g., prescription, transition, photochromatic, and polarized lenses) - Not for use on eyewear with anti-reflective (AR), cellulose acetate butryate (CAB), or cellulose acetate proportionate (CAP) polarized coatings - For best results on eyeglasses: spray on and allow to dry for a couple of minutes at first application, then lightly buff with cloth; repeat to improve effectiveness === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Anti-Fog Spray for Goggles, Masks, 2-pk

openai.item_name: GEAR AID 2-pk 0.5 fl oz Anti-Fog Spray

anthropic.title_differentiation: Prevents Fogging On Goggles, Masks And Eyeglasses, Alcohol-Free Cleaner, 150 Sprays Per Bottle, Works On Wet And Dry Lenses

openai.title_differentiation: Fog-Free Vision, Alcohol-Free Cleaner, Works On Goggles Masks And Eyeglasses, 150 Sprays, For Wet Or Dry Lenses
